block.text: You pop out of the doomed flyer a second before it explodes. The enemy robots shoot past, without seeing you. You feel a tug on your harness — and over you spread the wings of a parasail! You find you can guide it as you please. If you steer for the heart of the enemy encampment, where a crowd of men are looking up at you, turn to 205. If you steer away and try to lose yourself in the buildings, turn to 226.

choice.text: If you steer for the heart of the enemy encampment, where a crowd of men are looking up at you.
. If you steer away and try to lose yourself in the buildings.
